note: Watchlist for the Actionable Market Brief. TICKERS ONLY — never store position sizes, share counts, cost basis, or P&L in this file (it is committed to a PUBLIC repo). If sizing is ever needed it MUST live in localStorage or a gitignored local file only. Each item optionally points at a bespoke deep-analysis tool via 'model'; absence means the brief renders a computed status card. Educational only — not investment advice.
